info.title: semtex
info.description: Semtex - Remove the Git friction that is discouraging you from making improvements to your C# codebase

commands.name: check
commands.description: Analyze the specified remote repository and branch/commit to identify changes that will affect the program's runtime behaviour.

options.name: --base
options.description: Specify the base branch or SHA for comparison. The default value is the parent commit of target.

options.name: --all-ancestors
options.description: Analyze the previous 250 ancestors of the given commit. If this option is used, --base is ignored. [default: False]

options.name: --project-filter
options.description: Only consider changes in a specific project. Useful for debugging.

options.name: --project-map-file
options.description: Use this option if your codebase does not follow the standard hierarchical project layout. Refer to the compute-project-file-map command for generating this file.

options.name: --Information
options.description: Set the logging verbosity level. [default: Information]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

arguments.name: REPO_URL
arguments.description: Origin url of Git repository, including protocol (https, ssh, etc.).

arguments.name: TARGET
arguments.description: Branch or SHA containing the changes.

commands.name: commit
commands.description: Commits one of the partitions of your changes generated by the split commands

options.name: --repo-path
options.description: Path to the local Git repository checkout. Accepts both absolute and relative paths. [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-semtex-1.1.2-e34beaebac2f4afdbce4919474ff644a]

options.name: --Information
options.description: Set the logging verbosity level. [default: Information]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: compute-project-file-map
commands.description: This command is a prerequisite if your codebase does not follow the standard hierarchical project layout. It generates a file that maps each C# file to its respective project.

options.name: --Information
options.description: Set the logging verbosity level. [default: Information]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

arguments.name: SLN_PATH
arguments.description: Path to local solution file. Accepts both absolute and relative paths.

arguments.name: OUTPUT_FILE_PATH
arguments.description: Defines the path where the mapping will be saved.

commands.name: split
commands.description: Partition uncommitted changes into two patch files: one for behavioural changes and one for quality improvements.

options.name: --repo-path
options.description: Path to the local Git repository checkout. Accepts both absolute and relative paths. [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-semtex-1.1.2-e34beaebac2f4afdbce4919474ff644a]

options.name: --base
options.description: Branch or SHA to compare against. [default: HEAD]

options.name: --include-uncommitted
options.description: Specify which uncommitted changes to include. [default: Staged]

options.name: --Information
options.description: Set the logging verbosity level. [default: Information]

options.name: --project-map-file
options.description: Use this option if your codebase does not follow the standard hierarchical project layout. Refer to the compute-project-file-map command for generating this file.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: split-remote
commands.description: Split a specific commit from a remote repository into two patch files: one for behavioural changes and one for quality improvements.

options.name: --base
options.description: Specify the base branch or SHA for comparison. The default value is the parent commit of target.

options.name: --Information
options.description: Set the logging verbosity level [default: Information]

options.name: --project-map-file
options.description: Use this option if your codebase does not follow the standard hierarchical project layout. Refer to the compute-project-file-map command for generating this file.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

arguments.name: REPO_URL
arguments.description: Origin url of Git repository, including protocol (https, ssh, etc.).

arguments.name: TARGET
arguments.description: Branch or SHA containing the changes you want to split.

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information
